notes: Primary source (cse.bubt.edu.bd) carries contact + research detail; secondary (bubt.edu.bd) is names/ranks only and uses a different profile-id scheme.
Faculty pages do not expose room/building/faculty_code fields, so those are null for everyone. The faculty_code values some profiles show are just the numeric profile id echoed back, not real codes.

LEADERSHIP CONFLICT: cse.bubt.edu.bd lists Md. Saifur Rahman (id 15) as Chairman (Acting). bubt.edu.bd lists Prof. Dr. Md. Ahsan Habib as Chairman; Ahsan Habib does NOT appear anywhere in the cse.bubt.edu.bd roster. Treat chairman as unresolved pending a primary confirmation.
on_leave is best-effort from profile text; null means the page did not state leave status.
